decisions.briefing: Markets were quiet today with the NASDAQ off 0.3% and S&P 500 barely negative — a neutral session with no strong directional signal. Our portfolio is healthy at +31.6% total gain with 6 solid positions. Cash sits at $477, just below the $500 threshold for adding new positions, so no new buys are warranted without first rotating out of something — and with no clear underperformer to cut, we hold and let the existing momentum plays work.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted slightly lower in a low-conviction session, with the NASDAQ losing 0.3% and the S&P 500 slipping 0.1%. The mild pullback reflects a broader pause after recent gains, as investors awaited fresh catalysts — no major macro data or Fed commentary provided direction. Sector rotation appeared muted, with neither growth nor value making a decisive move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日小幅回落，走勢膠著，那斯達克指數下跌0.3%，標普500指數微跌0.1%，整體屬中性盤面。市場在近期升勢後出現短暫休整，投資者觀望新一輪催化劑出現，聯儲局亦無最新政策訊號。板塊輪動不明顯，成長股與價值股均無明確方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio. When cash sits idle, it earns little to nothing while the rest of the portfolio (or the benchmark) compounds. Today's situation illustrates this: with $477 in cash and 4 open slots, we're technically losing ground versus a fully-invested benchmark — but prudent rules (the $500 minimum) prevent us from making undersized, high-cost trades just to 'stay invested.'
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）指的是投資組合中持有未投資現金所帶來的表現損耗。當現金閒置時，它幾乎不產生回報，而組合其餘部分或基準指數卻持續複利增長。今日情況正好說明這一點：帳戶持有477美元現金、尚有4個倉位空缺，理論上跑輸全倉投入的基準——但合理的交易規則（最低500美元入場門檻）防止我們為了「保持滿倉」而做出倉位過小、成本過高的交易。
